titles.text: Simple 1500 Series Vol. 17: The Bike Race
Simple 1500 シリーズ Vol.17 The バイクレース

descriptions.text: Simple 1500 Vol.17 - The Bike Race is a supercross racing game in which you can compete in a series mode or a single race mode. Differents bikes to buy after you earn money winning races and 5 differents characters to choose.
